non_blocking_issues: #4 remember-key fix is symptom-correct; compute-effective-inside-derivedStateOf would be more durable (deferred).
#3 refresh button contentDescription should stay distinct from force-reconnect (reused common_refresh).
notes: Plan-level review of the session/model UX fixes targeting v0.10.5. Original plan scored below the 9.5 gate due to placement/architecture gaps (Fix #1 inside SettingsVM infeasible; Fix #3 over-engineered extraction). All MAJOR items resolved by adopting reviewer-recommended revisions: #1 -> call-site refreshDirectorySessions after connectWorkdir (SessionsScreen), NOT inside SettingsViewModel; #3 -> reuse the already-public, already-guarded connectionVM.loadInitialData() instead of extracting a parallel method; #4 -> one-line remember(noHostFallback, effectiveAgent, effectiveModel). Verified: ./scripts/check.sh green; emulator behavioral pass (model menu updates live on switch without tab reopen; refresh button fires full session+directory fan-out; post-clear-data self-heal repopulates).
